creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #1)

The culprit may be around f28dff43ad62ee7396abde1f8449ead1ece98053, but that's ~24 hours before the hash you posted in comment #2.

I suspect that we need to more tightly define what 'eficom' (aka 'comconsole') means to be, for the moment, exactly the serial part of ConOut and 'efi' cannot be used at the same time. I think I broke at least some of that coupling when I made efi not active more aggressively. I may have broken POLA accidentally here.

I'm also looking for a good image / whatever to test this with and how to install it if I get a Microsoft Developer account.
